etymology.description: Depicts two bent lines -> originally meant 'to divide' -> borrowed for phonetic similarity to mean 'eight'

examples.chinese: 他有八个苹果(他有八個蘋果)。
这只猫已经八岁了(這隻貓已經八歲了)。
examples.pinyin: Zhè zhī māo yǐjīng bā suì le.
examples.english: This cat is already eight years old.

examples.chinese: 我上午八点上班(我上午八點上班)。
examples.english: I start work at eight in the morning.
